delegations.title: DC Northeast Growth
delegations.description: I would like to develop a plan to grow my business Pro-Tel.  I would like to focus on the Data Center Structured cable installation market in Upstate NY and PA.  The output should be daily emails to my work email tim.ryan@pro-tel.com that continue to guide me to the goal.
